message:
refactor(gmail): migrate auth to shared fcp-google-discovery substrate

Replace the Gmail-specific GmailAuth enum and GmailAuthMode with the
shared GoogleMaterializedAuth from fcp-google-discovery, unifying
credential handling (bearer tokens, secretless credential references,
OAuth refresh) across all Google API connectors.

- client.rs: remove GmailAuth enum (AccessToken/CredentialId) and its
  Debug/redacted_label/is_secretless impls; use GoogleMaterializedAuth
  directly; consolidate auth application with quota project header
  support for CredentialReference variant; add auth_redacted_label()
- connector.rs: remove GmailAuthMode enum (AccessToken/CredentialId/
  OAuthRefresh) and use GoogleAuthSelection/GoogleMaterializedAuth
  from the shared auth crate
- Cargo.toml: add fcp-google-discovery dependency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
